channel.title: Journal on Circuit 台灣
channel.description: Recent content in Journal on Circuit 台灣

item.title: The AI Co-Pilot: Our Silent Crew Member
item.description: How a modular Artificial Intelligence stack powers the safety, logistics, and storytelling of Circuit Taiwan.

item.title: Cultural & Indigenous Engagement: Respecting Traditional Territories
item.description: Our protocol for engaging with Taiwan's indigenous communities along the coastal route.

item.title: Medical Protocol & Field Safety Architecture
item.description: Real-time telemetry, offline-capable alerts, and verified response protocols for 35-day Taiwan circumnavigation.

item.title: Engineering Advisor Confirmed: Technical Architecture Locked
item.description: Bernard joins Circuit Taiwan as Engineering Advisor, bringing route experience and safety-system expertise.

item.title: Why Local Hotels Beat B&Bs for our Expedition
item.description: The surprising truth about accessibility, logistics, and value for multi-day adaptive travel.

item.title: Sponsorship Framework: Tiers, Visibility, and Category Exclusivity
item.description: How contribution levels unlock branding, data access, and category protection on Circuit Taiwan.

item.title: The Green Ghost of the Expedition
item.description: Balancing zero-emission ideals with real-world infrastructure constraints.

item.title: The Assistance Vehicle as Mobile Billboard
item.description: 35 days of island-wide exposure, filmed daily, in every piece of content.

item.title: The Methodology: Engineering the Edge
item.description: Understanding the four core dimensions of our field research architecture.

item.title: 25 Years After: Another Round of Taiwan, at Wheelchair Height
item.description: Twenty-five years ago, I drove around Taiwan in a car. The roads were narrower, the Su-Hua Highway still carved raw into cliff faces, and I saw the island at 80 km/h through a windshield.
